landing.badge: 🚀 Early access — free while in beta
landing.heroSub: Connect Gmail. AI scans your emails, extracts contacts & deals, and drafts follow-ups. Zero data entry. No training required.
landing.step1Desc: One click OAuth. AI only scans business emails, skips newsletters and spam.
landing.step2Desc: Claude reads your conversations, extracts contacts and deals, places them on a Kanban board.
landing.step3Desc: AI notices stale conversations and drafts follow-up emails in your voice. You approve and send.
landing.feature1Desc: AI extracts contacts, companies, and deals from your existing Gmail conversations.
landing.feature2Desc: Deals automatically move through Lead → Contacted → Negotiation → Won.
landing.feature3Desc: Daily follow-up reminders with pre-written emails. Read, edit, click send.
landing.ctaTitle: Stop paying for 95% of features you never touch.
landing.footer: © 2026 AI CRM. Built for solo founders who hate data entry.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.sub: 14-day free trial on all plans. No credit card required.

dashboard.noGmailTitle: Connect your Gmail to get started
dashboard.noGmailDesc: Connect Gmail to build your pipeline automatically
